name: workspace_orchestrator
description: Allows the assistant to actively move, resize, and arrange windows into functional layouts.

actions.name: workspace_arrange
actions.description: Arranges windows into a specific layout (e.g., 'research' for browser/notes split).

actions.name: window_move
actions.description: Moves a specific window to coordinates. Payload: 'Title|x,y,w,h'

actions.name: window_maximize
actions.description: Maximizes the specified window or the currently active one.
